description_long: This object is an open book with a light beige or off-white cover and pages. The book is slightly curved at the spine, giving it a natural, partially open appearance. The pages are marked with evenly spaced, horizontal dark lines, suggesting printed text or illustrations, but no specific images or text are discernible. The exterior surface is smooth and unadorned, with no visible cover art, embossing, or decorative elements. The spine is rounded and blends seamlessly with the covers, lacking any visible text or design. The overall form is simple and utilitarian, resembling a generic, unbranded book that could be found in a variety of urban settings.
description: A plain, open book with light beige covers and pages marked by dark horizontal lines, lacking any visible illustration or text. The design is simple and unadorned, with a smooth, curved spine.
description_view_0: The book is seen from above, showing two open pages with dark horizontal lines and a subtle central crease at the spine.
description_view_1: A side view reveals the book's curved, open form and the thickness of the covers and pages, with the lines on the pages visible.
description_view_2: The back view displays the plain, unmarked covers and the rounded spine, with no visible text or illustration.
description_view_3: Another side view, similar to view 1, highlighting the book's open curvature and the lined pages.
